1_clean_state.description: State was already clean from previous tests

2_create_evaluation_tree.description: Created thought tree with 4 child thoughts (A, B, C, D)
2_create_evaluation_tree.expected: Tree created with root and 4 child thoughts
2_create_evaluation_tree.actual: Tree 'find-the-best-approach-to-solve-a-problem' created with root and 4 child thoughts: Approach A (brute force), Approach B (dynamic programming), Approach C (greedy), Approach D (divide and conquer)

3_evaluate_thoughts_with_simple_scores.description: Evaluated each child thought with simple scores
3_evaluate_thoughts_with_simple_scores.expected: Each thought has evaluation with score and reasoning
3_evaluate_thoughts_with_simple_scores.actual: All 4 thoughts evaluated with scores: A=60, B=85, C=40, D=75. All thoughts transitioned to 'evaluated' state. Evaluation reasoning stored in metadata

4_evaluate_with_multi_criteria.description: Re-evaluated Thought B with multi-criteria scores
4_evaluate_with_multi_criteria.expected: Multi-criteria fields stored, custom criteria preserved
4_evaluate_with_multi_criteria.actual: Thought B re-evaluated with creativity=70, risk=30, criteriaScores={time_complexity: 90, space_complexity: 80, implementation_difficulty: 70}. All multi-criteria fields preserved

5_test_pruning.expected: Thoughts with score < 50 pruned (Thought C with score 40)
5_test_pruning.actual: prune_tree with threshold 50 pruned 1 thought (Thought C with score 40). Thought C state changed to 'pruned'. Other thoughts remained active

6_test_pruning_with_risk_threshold.description: Added high-risk thought and pruned with risk threshold 40
6_test_pruning_with_risk_threshold.expected: High-risk thoughts pruned even if score is good
6_test_pruning_with_risk_threshold.actual: Added 'High risk approach' with score 70, risk 50. prune_tree with threshold 50 and riskThreshold 40 pruned 1 thought (high-risk approach). High-risk thought pruned despite good score

7_test_thought_selection.description: Selected Thought B for further exploration
7_test_thought_selection.actual: select_thought marked Thought B as 'selected'. State changed from 'evaluated' to 'selected'

8_test_backtracking.actual: backtrack marked Thought A as 'pruned'. Thought A had no descendants, so only itself was pruned

9_test_thought_verification.description: Verified Thought B with verification notes
9_test_thought_verification.expected: Thought B marked as verified, notes stored
9_test_thought_verification.actual: verify_thought marked Thought B as verified=true. Verification notes 'Tested with sample inputs, confirmed optimal performance' stored

10_test_auto_evaluation_of_parent_though.description: Created parent with 3 children, evaluated all children
10_test_auto_evaluation_of_parent_though.expected: Parent auto-evaluates when all children evaluated, score is average
10_test_auto_evaluation_of_parent_though.actual: Created 'Caching strategy' parent with 3 children. After evaluating all 3 children (80, 90, 85), parent automatically became 'evaluated' with score 85 (average of 80+90+85=255/3=85). Parent updatedAt timestamp updated

11_verify_persistence.description: Waited 2 seconds for debounced save, verified thoughtflow-state.json
11_verify_persistence.actual: Thought scores and reasoning persisted. Multi-criteria evaluations persisted. Pruning state persisted. Selection state persisted. Verification state persisted. Backtracking state persisted

key_findings.simple_evaluation: WORKING - Thoughts evaluated with simple scores and reasoning
key_findings.multi_criteria_evaluation: WORKING - Multi-criteria fields (creativity, risk, criteriaScores) preserved
key_findings.pruning: WORKING - Low-scoring thoughts pruned correctly based on threshold
key_findings.risk_based_pruning: WORKING - High-risk thoughts pruned even with good scores
key_findings.selection: WORKING - Thoughts can be marked as selected for exploration
key_findings.backtracking: WORKING - Thoughts and descendants pruned via backtrack
key_findings.verification: WORKING - Thoughts can be verified with notes
key_findings.auto_evaluation: WORKING - Parent auto-evaluates when all children evaluated, score averaged correctly
